raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 136 would eliminate the one-year enhancement imposed on every repeat offender for each prior felony conviction.",
    "Those who repeatedly violate the law are generally more of a public safety threat than first-time offenders.",
    "There is a genuine concern among Californians that recent legislation has led to more potentially dangerous individuals on the streets.",
    "Enhancements acknowledge the seriousness of the harm inflicted upon victims and hold accountable habitual and dangerous offenders who commit violent felonies.",
    "Senator Brian Jones believes that SB 136 will undermine the public safety of Californians."
  ]
}
```
